measurements.title: My measurements
measurements.help: Save the measurements and picking the right size is easy when buying new gear. Measure once — the app converts for every brand's sizing method.
measurements.savedAsNew: Saved as a new entry — history is growing!

instructions.chest: measure around the chest at the nipples · for shoulder pads
instructions.forearm: back of the elbow to the wrist, arm at 90° · for elbow pads
instructions.waist: measure around the belly where the pants sit (the app adjusts per brand) · for hockey pants
instructions.shin: middle of the kneecap to the outer ankle bone (the app adjusts per brand) · for shin guards
instructions.hand: tip of the middle finger to the wrist · for gloves
instructions.foot: stand on a piece of paper, measure heel to longest toe · for skates
instructions.head: measure around the head just above the ears and eyebrows · for helmets

measurements.shoeSizeHelp: if you haven't measured the foot — approximate, always measure and try in store
measurements.historyEmpty: No measurements yet. Save measurements to build up history.

sizing.title: Size suggestions
sizing.help: Measure once — the app automatically converts for every brand's sizing method. Still, always try gear on in a store when you can.
sizing.fromShoe: from shoe size — measure and try in store

notes.ccmShin: adjusted: CCM measures to the skate boot top

sizing.disclaimer: This app is not affiliated with or endorsed by Bauer, CCM or any other brand. All trademarks belong to their respective owners. Size suggestions are a guide — always confirm the size with the retailer before buying.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.deleteConfirm: Delete {{name}}? All gear and measurements for this profile will be removed.
profiles.empty: Create a profile for every player in the family.

onboarding.welcomeText: Keep track of the hockey gear and get the right size for every brand — measure just once.
onboarding.profileText: Create a profile for the player. More family members can be added later.

settings.title: Settings
settings.share: Share the app with a friend
settings.shareText: Check out this app for keeping track of hockey gear and getting the right size!
settings.importHelp: Open the old web app, tap "Export my data" and paste the text here.
settings.importError: Couldn't read the data. Copy the whole export and try again.
settings.aboutText: Hockey Gear · an independent app. Trademarks such as Bauer and CCM belong to their respective owners and the app is not affiliated with them.
settings.privacy: All data stays on this device. Nothing is collected or sent anywhere.
settings.sourcesText: Bauer: “Bauer Protective Equipment”, TUUK runner chart · CCM: official size guide (monkeysportseurope.com), Tacks 910, SkatePro · Warrior: intersport.se
